item.title: The neural development of prosocial behavior from childhood to adolescence
item.description: Citation: Do, K. T., McCormick, E. M., & Telzer, E. H. (2019). The neural development of prosocial behavior from childhood to adolescence. Social Cognitive and Affective Neuroscience, 14(2), 129-139.

item.title: Neural correlates of sibling closeness and association with externalizing behavior in adolescence
item.description: Citation: Rogers, C. R., McCormick, E. M., van Hoorn, J., Ivory, S., & Telzer, E. H. (2018). Neural correlates of sibling closeness and association with externalizing behavior in adolescence. Social Cognitive and Affective Neuroscience, 13, 977–988.
